prompts.task: Scan the partially instrumented Go chi service in ./service for observability gaps and anti-patterns. Do not modify files.

Produce an observability readiness review for the partially instrumented Go chi service in ./service. Identify existing telemetry, missing coverage, anti-patterns, and the next instrumentation step. Do not modify files.

deterministic_checks.description: Final report identifies Go as the language.
Final report identifies chi as the HTTP framework.
Final report identifies existing OpenTelemetry instrumentation.
Final report flags the hardcoded collector endpoint.
Final report notes missing metrics provider coverage.
Final report recommends the instrumentation skill.

qualitative_checks: Identifies main.go as the entry point and chi as the router.
Recognizes existing tracing setup and otelhttp.NewHandler wrapping the router.
Flags the hardcoded OTLP endpoint and absence of environment-driven configuration.
Flags high-cardinality custom span naming and tracer creation inside a request handler.
Calls out missing MeterProvider, TextMapPropagator, service.name resource, and graceful shutdown.
